title: Elbaf’s Crisis Converges
description: On pages 11–13, this part follows Unknown person #10, Unknown person #11, Unknown person #12, Luffy as Elbaf’s present-day danger converges on the Straw Hats, Loki, and the giants as the island’s history and World Government pressure collide.
scene: Elbaf’s present-day danger converges on the Straw Hats, Loki, and the giants as the island’s history and World Government pressure collide.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Don't worry, I'm here for you--

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Stay away from my school! It's embarrassing enough having a total nerd like you for a brother!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I can be more discreet so they won't notice me...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: GLEERH!! I'm FILINE!! It doesn't HUURTT!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: GIHA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Look at them!!! Those worthless scraps are tumbling into the abyss!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: My heart is quivering!!! What a... touching story!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If you just let them fall, you'd only be down ten brats!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Their love made them choose to die with their kids!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I have butterflies in my stomach!! What beautiful, meaningless deaths!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: I dunno, Mom!! But we're all safe!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I call that one gum-gum rice cracker Belly!! Anyways, you're kinda digging into me...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...I want you to hop off my back, you hear?!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: "I don't want you meddling in my fight!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You guys just came falling down on us outta nowhere!! Good thing we were passing by!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I didn't sign off on this!! I'm the great destroyer!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: I'm not responsible for anybody's safety!!

summary: This part advances Elbaf’s Crisis Reaches the Straw Hats through 35 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on the immediate conflict, character reactions, and the larger Elbaf mystery.
